mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (id, product_id, buyer_id, seller_id, price, status, shipping_address, contact_phone, note, trade_no, seller_alipay_account, transfer_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{productId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{price}, #{status}, #{shippingAddress}, #{contactPhone}, #{note}, #{tradeNo}, #{sellerAlipayAccount}, #{transferStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = 'cancelled', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET trade_no = #{tradeNo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET transfer_status = #{transferStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
